title: Structural Optimization
objective: Analyze the integration between ProjectCortex and SynthesisAgent and suggest 1 performance optimization.

tasks.intent: Investigate the integration code between ProjectCortex and SynthesisAgent for potential performance bottlenecks
Explore existing literature and best practices for optimizing similar integrations
Propose a performance optimization based on the audit findings and research
Implement the proposed performance optimization for the integration between ProjectCortex and SynthesisAgent
Test the optimized integration for correct functionality and performance improvement
Review the tested optimized integration for potential side effects or regressions
